title: AMD Q1 2026 Earnings: Strong AI-Driven Growth
text: AMD delivered Q1 2026 results with revenue of $10.25 billion (38% YoY), adjusted EPS jumped 43% to $1.37. Data center revenue surged 57% driven by robust demand for Epyc server processors and Instinct GPUs. Meta plans to deploy up to 6 gigawatts AMD Instinct GPUs, lead customer for sixth-generation Epyc CPUs. Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Tencent increasing cloud instances powered by AMD Epyc processors for inference and agentic AI. AMD controls 36% server CPU market (up from 27% YoY). Management doubled server CPU market growth estimate to 35% annually with segment generating $120 billion by 2030. AMD projects 70% YoY server CPU revenue growth current quarter, targeting 80%+ long-term annual growth data center AI business. Current $731 billion market cap with accelerating trajectory suggests $1 trillion valuation possible.
